title: abutilon leschenaultianum
intro: Abutilon leschenaultianum, also known as Indian mallow or Rose mallow, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Abutilon leschenaultianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
